fields.title: Restore pre-existing agent test/typecheck blockers
fields.description: `extensions/tau` gate is currently blocked by pre-existing agent/worker failures unrelated to the memory-tool redesign. Current blockers:n- `test/worker-resource-loader.test.ts`: imports `createWorkerResourceLoader` from `src/agent/worker.ts`, but the export is missing at typecheck/runtime.n- `test/agent-sandbox-policy.test.ts`: expects worker-safe `workspace-write` defaults, but current code returns `full-access`.n- `test/agent-registry-mode-prompts.test.ts`: expects virtual mode agents to expose `memory`, but current registry omits it.nThis blocks `npm run gate` even though the memory-tool tests pass.
fields.close_reason: Landed with passing extensions/tau gate, startup/runtime fix, updated tests, and extension reinstall.
